scope_project_consistency.name: scope_project_consistency
scope_project_consistency.value: ("policies"."scope" = 'global' AND "policies"."project_id" IS NULL) OR ("policies"."scope" = 'project' AND "policies"."project_id" IS NOT NULL)

connector_cache_connector_package_scope_.name: connector_cache_connector_package_scope_idx
connector_cache_connector_package_scope_.where: "connector_cache"."package_id" IS NOT NULL AND "connector_cache"."package_version_id" IS NULL

violation_suppressions_package_scope.name: violation_suppressions_package_scope
violation_suppressions_package_scope.value: "violation_suppressions"."package_id" IS NOT NULL OR "violation_suppressions"."package_version_id" IS NOT NULL
